scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured calculation or lookup outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within laboratory and research operations scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured calculation or lookup outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: JSON output schema fully specified with mitigation_recommendations always present; --output flag documented; model limitations explicitly stated including international route counterintuitive scoring.

reliability.note: Duration <= 0 validation documented with exit code 1; invalid packaging type rejection documented; script stub still accepts negative values after four rounds.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 128 lines — lean; no external dependencies.

agent_usability.note: Fallback template present; JSON output schema documented; error handling section comprehensive; response template clear.

human_usability.note: Description is precise; scope boundary clear; model limitations documented.

security.note: No credential concerns; route string passed to output but no code execution risk; no injection vectors.

maintainability.note: SKILL.md documents full implementation contract; model formula documented with limitations.

agent_specific.note: Trigger description is precise; JSON output schema documented; --output flag present; escape hatches present; no progressive disclosure via references/.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate route-specific data
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.
Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

inputs.label: Negative duration input (-5 hours)

assertions.text: Invalid duration input is documented to be rejected with error message
assertions.note: SKILL.md Error Handling section specifies this behavior

assertions.text: Output does not crash on edge input
assertions.note: Confirmed: output does not crash on edge input as expected.
Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

assertions.text: Script actually enforces duration > 0 at runtime
assertions.note: Documentation updated across four rounds but script stub still accepts negative values; implementation gap persists

key_strengths: SKILL.md fully specifies JSON output contract including mitigation_recommendations field always present with at least one item
Input validation for negative/zero duration and invalid packaging type documented with exact error messages
Model limitations explicitly documented including counterintuitive international route scoring
Scope boundary clearly rejects real-time tracking, drug dosing, and non-temperature logistics

recommendations.title: Script stub does not enforce documented validation rules — fourth consecutive round
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents that --duration <= 0 must be rejected with exit code 1, but the script stub still accepts negative values and produces nonsensical negative risk scores across all four rounds.
recommendations.root_cause: SKILL.md polish updated documentation but the script was not re-implemented to match across any of the four rounds.
recommendations.fix: Implement scripts/main.py to enforce: if args.duration <= 0, print 'Error: --duration must be a positive integer (hours).' to stderr and sys.exit(1). Also output structured JSON matching the documented schema.

recommendations.title: Script output is still plain text, not structured JSON — fourth consecutive round
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents a JSON output schema with route, duration_hours, packaging, risk_score, risk_level, and mitigation_recommendations, but the script only prints plain text lines.
recommendations.root_cause: Script was not re-implemented after SKILL.md polish; stub remains at 42 lines across four rounds.
recommendations.fix: Refactor scripts/main.py to output json.dumps({route, duration_hours, packaging, risk_score, risk_level, mitigation_recommendations}) to stdout. Add --output flag to save to file.

recommendations.title: Risk model does not account for route complexity
recommendations.problem: Formula (duration * 0.5 * packaging_factor) lacks route_complexity_factor; model limitations are documented but not addressed.
recommendations.root_cause: Formula simplicity was a design choice; route complexity factor was not added despite being flagged across three rounds.
recommendations.fix: Add a route_complexity_factor based on number of transit legs or distance. Document the factor in the Risk Model table in SKILL.md.
